titleStmt.title: SII 9.242: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 242. (A.R. No. 31 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT AMBALI, KUDLIGI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1065, Rudhirōdgari, Pushya, puṇṇame, Sōmavāra, Uttarāyaṇa, Vyatīpāta. In Rudhirōdgarin, Pausha śu. 15 corresponded to A.D. 1143 December 23 Thursday, not Monday; the Uttarāyaṇa day fell on December 25 Saturday. The record refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Jagadēkamalladeva (II) ruling from Kalyāṇa and states that, while his feudatory the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jagadēkamalla-Vīrapāṇḍyadēva was ruling over Noḻambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand, Chibidēvarasa, son of Ghaṭṭidēva of the Kadamba dynasty made a gift of land for the service of the god Nārsiṁhadēva consecrated by Jñānaprakaśa-Bhaṭṭārakadēva at Ammeḷe. The record is damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja para
mēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī
matpratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamu
ttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ kalyāṇa
purada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttami
re tatpādapadmōpajīvi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁ
ḍaḷēśvaraṁ jagadēkamallavīrapā(ṁ)ṇḍyadēvaru noḷaṁbavāḍi mūvatti
cchāsiramumanāḷdu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttami
re svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara banavā
sipuravarādhīśvaraṁ kadaṁbakuḷakamaḷārkka nuḍidaṁtegaṇḍa ḷika
bēṁṭekāṟa ghaṭṭidēvana kumāṟa śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara
cibidēvarasaru koṭṭūroḷu sukhasaṁkatā
nōdadoḷirddu śakavarṣada 1065 neya rudhirōdgārisaṁ
vatsarada puṣya puṇnami sōmavāradaṁduttarāyaṇasaṁ
krānti vyatīpātadaṁdu Ammeḷeyalu jñānaprakāśabha
ṭṭārakadēvaru māḍisida śrīnārasiṁhadēvaraṁgabhō
gakke dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭūra paḍuvaṇa pola
tti kiṟiya koṭṭūra teṁkaṇa holavēreyindateṁka muṁde
kōgaḷiya sa da nālku mattarkkeyyaṁ sarbbanamaśya
vāgi biṭṭaru © mattamā puṇyadinadoḷu
rggaḍe sōma daṁḍanāyakaṁ
deṟeyalli biṭṭa hejjuṁka vaḍḍarāvuḷaA few more lines after this seem to have peeled off.
Digital edition of SII 9.242 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
